title: 3-Piece Set of Plastic Putty Knives, 2-Piece Glue Removal Scraper, Filling Tool, Flexible Paint Putty, Suitable for Repair, Decal, Plastering Filling, Wallpaper
features: 【 Product Content 】 You will receive a set of 3 plastic putty knives and 2 glue removal scrapers. The plastic putty knife has a total length of 8CM, and the glue removal scraper has a total length of 10CM, which meets your daily needs for small or repairing dry walls.

【 Labor saving 】 Our plastic putty knife cover handle is made of plastic material, and the handle can be curved in an ergonomic design. It has a comfortable and labor-saving grip, making it easier to operate, meeting your needs for on-site application, scraping, and cleaning.

【Anti corrosion】Our plastic putty spatula is made of PP plastic, which is soft and not easy to break. It has a long usage time, is not easy to rust or corrode, and is resistant to various chemicals and solvents, providing longer durability for your tasks

【 Safety 】 Our plastic putty knife is made of plastic material and designed to prevent sharp blades from being damaged. When applied, cleaned, or scratched, it will not damage surfaces such as car windows. At the same time, it makes your hands and fingers safer during use.

【 Multi functional 】 Our plastic putty knives and glue removal scrapers are used for applying joint agents, plastering or adhesives, repairing, decals, wallpaper, wall holes, and scratches. They can also be used for art and crafts creation, preparation, and drawing of large canvases
